pages.title: Your Sudoku
pages.description:
Arrange numbers in a classic nine-by-nine grid by applying logical deduction to fill missing digits while avoiding duplicates in each row, column, and box. Players improve their skills through progressively difficult puzzles that require pattern recognition and number placement strategy. The core mechanic emphasizes numeral logic challenges appealing to casual gamers and younger players interested in brain teasers.

Key Features

• Number placement logic puzzles  
• Mouse and keyboard input controls  
• Difficulty-based level progression  
• Timed and untimed gameplay modes  
• Classic sudoku grid layout
